text: The use of words in this verse is very strained, and it is likely that the Hebrew text was corrupt.
The Greek text here has, ‘What is it?’ The Latin version (‘Who is it?’) would apply to the sleeper, but gives no satisfactory sense as applied to the fool.
The Latin text here is evidently confused, and perhaps defective.

vv. 31, 32: It is difficult to make these verses into a continuous sentence; to render ‘let harm befall me through his agency’ is a mistranslation of the Greek. There has perhaps been an omission in the text.
